comment: Manager generation pool. hustle/consistency 1-10. Quirks are flavour + one small modifier, dry delivery, never wacky. Modifiers must stay within ±8% of any single stat.

managers.name: Archie T.
managers.quirk: Builds the roster three weeks out. Nobody knows how. Nobody asks.

managers.name: Kimberley R.
managers.quirk: Has never once run out of brioche. Suppliers fear her.

managers.name: Deano
managers.quirk: Gun on the grill. Availability described as 'spiritual'.

managers.name: Soph M.
managers.quirk: Replies to every review within the hour, including the unhinged ones.

managers.name: Trung N.
managers.quirk: Runs the pass like air traffic control. Headset optional but preferred.

managers.name: Bec W.
managers.quirk: Slow. Reliable. Has closed every Sunday for four years without comment.

managers.name: Jonno
managers.quirk: Over-orders buns every single week. Also never 86'd a burger during a rush.

managers.name: Priya K.
managers.quirk: Keeps a spreadsheet of which regulars order what. It is 40 tabs deep.

managers.name: Macca
managers.quirk: 17 years in hospo. Moves at one speed. It is the correct speed.

managers.name: Ellie F.
managers.quirk: Invented three specials that went on the permanent menu. Takes full credit. Fair enough.

managers.name: Hass
managers.quirk: Can smell a health inspector from the car park.

managers.name: Georgia P.
managers.quirk: Trains every new starter the same way: quietly, properly, once.

managers.name: Vinnie
managers.quirk: Negotiates with the delivery drivers like it's a hostage situation. Wait times down 20%.

managers.name: Tash L.
managers.quirk: The fryer section has never once beaten her. The fryer section has tried.

managers.name: Robbo
managers.quirk: Cheapest hire on the board. You get exactly what you pay for, on time, every time.

managers.name: Chen W.
managers.quirk: Does the stocktake to two decimal places. Found the till discrepancy from 2024.

managers.name: Freya D.
managers.quirk: Doubles output during a rush. Requires a debrief afterwards.

managers.name: Sammy O.
managers.quirk: Knows every regular's order and exactly one fact about their dog.

managers.name: Kez
managers.quirk: Locks up, sets the alarm, texts 'done'. Has never elaborated.

managers.name: Dougie B.
managers.quirk: Once catered a wedding out of the delivery window during a Friday service. Never again. Probably.
